summary: This document provides a market analysis of the Spanish private healthcare sector, detailing clinic distribution, profit margins, and technology adoption trends. It outlines sales preferences and decision-making processes specific to Spanish private clinics rather than the UK NHS. The content focuses on business models and competitive landscape within Spain.
